samples.xml_description:
<module id="fsm">
    <description>Diversity Hint: Prefer a case statement over chained if-else where applicable.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="IN">Input.</input>
        <input id="CLK">Clock.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset.</input>
        <output id="MATCH">Output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="S0">S0</enum>
        <enum id="S1">S1</enum>
        <enum id="S2">S2</enum>
        <enum id="S3">S3</enum>
        <enum id="S4">S4</enum>
        <enum id="S5">S5</enum>
        <enum id="S6">S6</enum>
        <enum id="S7">S7</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg id="MATCH" type="combinational_logic">
            <description>Output signal indicating a match.</description>
        </reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <enum_value id="S0">State 0</enum_value>
        <enum_value id="S1">State 1</enum_value>
        <enum_value id="S2">State 2</enum_value>
        <enum_value id="S3">State 3</enum_value>
        <enum_value id="S4">State 4</enum_value>
        <enum_value id="S5">State 5</enum_value>
        <enum_value id="S6">State 6</enum_value>
        <enum_value id="S7">State 7</enum_value>
        if <enum_condition> the input signal is equal to <enum_value>
        then set MATCH to 1
        else set MATCH to 0
        <enum_end>
    </implementation>
</module>
